name: Language Technologies Research Centre

name: Robotics Research Centre
description: Research in robotics, autonomous systems, mobile manipulation, and aerial vehicles.

name: Data Sciences and Analytics Center
description: Research in data engineering, analytics, and large-scale data systems.

name: Signal Processing and Communication Research Center
description: Research in signal processing, wireless communications, coding theory, and IoT.

name: Center for Security, Theory and Algorithmic Research
description: Research in algorithms, complexity theory, cryptography, distributed computing, and information security.

name: Software Engineering Research Centre
description: Research in software engineering, empirical methods, requirements engineering, and cloud computing.

name: Center for Visual Information Technology
description: Research in computer vision, image processing, computer graphics, and machine learning.

name: Center for VLSI and Embedded System Technologies
description: Research in VLSI design, embedded systems, IoT devices, and flexible electronics.

name: Computer Systems Group
description: Research in computer architecture, compilers, operating systems, and distributed computing.

name: Machine Learning Lab
description: Research in machine learning, optimization, game theory, and AI decision-making.

name: Centre for Quantum Science and Technology
description: Research in quantum algorithms, quantum cryptography, quantum networks, and quantum thermodynamics.

name: PreCog
description: Research in computational social science, cybersecurity, privacy, and social computing.

name: Lab for Spatial Informatics
description: Research in geospatial science, remote sensing, hydrology, and climate informatics.

name: Cognitive Science Lab
description: Interdisciplinary research on mind and behaviour using AI, psychology, neuroscience, and linguistics.

name: Earthquake Engineering Research Center
description: Research in structural engineering, seismic design, earthquake safety, and disaster mitigation.

name: Center for Computational Natural Sciences and Bioinformatics
description: Research in computational chemistry, bioinformatics, molecular dynamics, and nanoscience.

name: Human Sciences Research Centre
description: Research at the intersection of social sciences, humanities, and digital technologies.

name: Biomedical Research Center
description: Multidisciplinary research in biomedical devices, biosensors, medical imaging, and clinical neuroscience.

name: Cyber Manthan Center
description: Research in cybersecurity, privacy, and social computing.

name: Raj Reddy Center for Technology & Society
description: Research and technologies in solving societal problems.

name: iHub-Data
description: Research in data engineering, analytics, and large-scale data systems.
